name: data-storytelling-studio
description: Routes checked analysis into decision-facing visual stories, executive readouts, reports, decks, dashboards, and publishable sites.

interface.shortDescription: Turn checked analysis into decision-facing stories.
interface.longDescription: Data Storytelling Studio preserves the analytical source of truth while routing it to the right delivery format, auditing visual claims, and producing an answer-first executive readout with explicit evidence and caveats.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right output format for this checked analysis.
Audit whether each chart supports the claim beside it.
Turn this evidence into an executive readout with decisions and caveats.
